heading: LOVE PUBLICATIONS
description: Once upon a time, in the wild world of code and coffee, there lived a girl named Anwesha. She was not your average portfolio owner — oh no! Anwesha was a master of debugging, a queen of quirky variable names, and a connoisseur of late-night snacks.

papers.title: Anwesha Discovers JavaScript: A Love Story in 404 Lines
Debugging Her Heart: Anwesha's Guide to Catching Feelings (and Exceptions)
Birthday Breakpoints: How Anwesha Paused the World for Cake and Romance
